Jupiter. In the Navamsa the 5th lord is Mars and he is with
Ketu in Sagittarius. Hence the 5th lord is weak.
Putrakaraka.—Jupiter, Putrakaraka, occupying a
malefic sign, is aspected by Saturn from another malefic
sign Scorpio. In the Navamsa Jupiter is no doubt exalted
but his association with the Sun and his being aspected by
Mars are not good features.

236 How to Judge a Horoscope
Conclusion.—The 5th house is feebly strong, the lord
is weak and the karaka powerless. Birth of children is not
altogether ruled out. But the 5th house indications are a
source of misery for the native. One male issue was born in
1922 and died immediately. Subsequently there were two
abortions.
Chart No. 101.—Born on 6-5-1891 at 5-10 p.m.
(L.M.T.) (Lat. 18° 54' N., Long. 72° 49' E.)
Balance of Ketu Dasa at birth : Year 6-3-12.
The Fifth House.—The 5th house is Aquarius and it is
occupied by Jupiter Putrakaraka and hence bad. The 5th is
